message:
fix(db,server,tools): query refinements, cleanup improvements, and contact handling

- queries.rs: follow-up refinements to parameterized query paths
- cleanup.rs: improve cleanup logic for expired resources
- tui_screens/messages.rs: message display improvements
- contacts.rs: contact handling refinements
- Update Cargo.lock for dependency resolution

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
